name: psd-learning-page
description: OpenClaw skill: turn a document (PDF/Google Doc/markdown) into a self-contained WCAG 2.2 AA multi-modal learning page (explainer video + captions, narrated audio + transcript, interactive quiz, summary, full source) and publish it to Atrium. Composes psd-pdf-to-markdown, psd-workspace, psd-tts, psd-hyperframes, psd-atrium and the shared psd-html-artifact a11y gate. #1245
